headline: How The KeyCorp (KEY) Narrative Is Shifting As Bulls And Bears Reassess Upside Potential
summary: KeyCorp’s fair value estimate has been nudged to US$24.55 from US$24.45, a shift of less than 1% that keeps the model aligned with analyst targets clustered in the mid US$20s. That small adjustment reflects the current debate, with some firms lifting targets into the US$25 to US$26 range while others question how much upside remains after the stock’s recent move. As you read on, you will see how to track these evolving calls and what they might mean for your own KeyCorp view. Stay updated as...
